'''Hjaff''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Tarc]], a isolationist [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Crustacean/Legends|crustacean]] creatures. Hjaff had three continents.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Hjaff was in a region under the jurisdiction of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Joss Leskwin]] but remained out of the control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], who had difficulty in subduing the native Tarc, with Leskwin hoping to gather enough forces to eventually overwhelm the alien natives.<ref name="SWAJ14">{{JournalCite|14|Alien Encounters (article series)}}</ref>
